decision: Use a two-stage AI asset lane: style-consistent PNG concepts first, then image-to-3D reconstruction or generation, followed by Blender cleanup and GLB QA.

imageGeneration.name: FLUX.1-schnell
imageGeneration.role: Default fast concept generation candidate for permissive ideation.
imageGeneration.licenseSignal: apache-2.0 from Hugging Face API metadata
imageGeneration.notes: Use for concepts and style exploration. Keep exact prompt, seed, and model revision.

imageGeneration.name: Stable Diffusion XL Base 1.0
imageGeneration.role: Alternate concept generation and LoRA ecosystem candidate.
imageGeneration.licenseSignal: openrail++ from Hugging Face API metadata
imageGeneration.notes: Useful if we want a broader LoRA tooling ecosystem.

styleConsistency.name: ComfyUI
styleConsistency.role: Local workflow runner for model graphs, LoRAs, ControlNet-style conditioning, upscaling, and repeatable image generation.
styleConsistency.notes: Use saved workflows as production recipes. Do not rely on one-off prompt memory.

backgroundRemoval.name: RMBG-2.0
backgroundRemoval.role: Background removal and cutout preparation candidate.
backgroundRemoval.licenseSignal: other from Hugging Face API metadata
backgroundRemoval.notes: Treat as review-required before commercial use.

imageTo3D.name: Hunyuan3D 2.1
imageTo3D.licenseSignal: other from Hugging Face API metadata; Tencent Hunyuan 3D 2.1 Community License Agreement
imageTo3D.notes: Strong technical candidate. License includes territory limitations and requires review before commercial production.

imageTo3D.name: Stable Fast 3D
imageTo3D.licenseSignal: other from Hugging Face API metadata
imageTo3D.notes: Useful for quick mesh drafts. Review license/terms before production.

imageTo3D.name: TripoSR
imageTo3D.licenseSignal: mit from Hugging Face API metadata
imageTo3D.notes: Often less polished, but excellent as a fallback and for tooling tests.

cleanupAndOptimization.name: Blender
cleanupAndOptimization.role: Scale, origin, retopology, rigging, UV cleanup, material cleanup, and GLB export.

cleanupAndOptimization.name: glTF-Transform
cleanupAndOptimization.role: GLB inspection, optimization, texture conversion hooks, mesh compression, and repeatable CLI transforms.

runtime.name: Three.js
runtime.role: Browser-native rendering layer for Solana games.
runtime.notes: Kintara publicly exposes Three.js 0.160.0; we can pin runtime versions per project.
